The '''Mandalorian ripper''' was an energy-propelled [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrower]] pistol that was produced in great numbers during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. It was a common sidearm for [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] officers during the [[Mandalorian Wars]].

==Description==
The ripper was highly versatile and upgradeable. When properly modified and in the hands of a capable marksman, they proved devastating to opponents. They also ignored [[Personal energy shield/Legends|personal shielding]], giving the wielder an advantage in ranged combat if both combatants were shielded.

Despite being a slugthrower, it was legally classified as a [[Disruptor/Legends|disruptor]] weapon, and thus banned for civilian use on most [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] worlds.

A heavier rifle version existed during the Great War.

A variant of this weapon was the [[Ripper (weapon)|ripper]], which was also a pistol designed to penetrate personal energy shields.

==History==
In [[3961 BBY]],<ref name="Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> while [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] was searching for the [[Star Map]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], his group was ambushed in the [[Shadowlands/Legends|Shadowlands]] by cloaked Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders. After being lured out of hiding, the commander of these Mandalorians finally attacked Revan's party. He was equipped with a Mandalorian ripper.<ref name="KOTOR1" />
